1A.name: Coefficients of modular function j as power series in q = e^(2 Pi i t). Another name is the elliptic modular invariant J(tau).

2A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 2B for the Monster group with a(0) = -24.

2B.name: Expansion of 16 * (1 + k^2)^4 /(k * k'^2)^2 in powers of q where k is the Jacobian elliptic modulus, k' the complementary modulus and q is the nome.

3A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 3A for the Monster group with a(0) = 42.

3B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 6E for Monster (and, apart from signs, of class 12B).

3C.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 3B for the Monster group with a(0) = -12.

4A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 2B for the Monster group.

4B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4C for the Monster group.

4C.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4D for the Monster group.

4D.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 4a for the Monster group.

5A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 5A for the Monster group.

5B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 5B for the Monster group with a(0) = 0.

6A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 5a for Monster.

6B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 6A for Monster.

6C.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 6B for Monster.

6D.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 6C for Monster (and, apart from signs, of class 12A).

6E.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 6D for Monster.

7A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 7A for the Monster group with a(0) = 10.

7B.name: Expansion of eta(q) * eta(q^3) * eta(q^5) * eta(q^15) in powers of q.

8A.name: Coefficients in expansion of E_2*E_4/(E_6*j) in powers of 1/j.

10B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 12I for the Monster group.

12A.name: Expansion of q^(-1/2) * eta(q) * eta(q^2) * eta(q^3) * eta(q^6) in powers of q.

12B.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 13B for the Monster group.

13A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 13A for the Monster group with a(0) = -2.

25A.name: McKay-Thompson series of class 20D for Monster.
